## Portfolio polish checklist

- [ ] Replace placeholder audio files with licensed, non-empty MP3s:
  - [ ] `assets/audio/lofi.mp3`
  - [ ] `assets/audio/rain.mp3`
  - [ ] `assets/audio/brown-noise.mp3`
- [ ] Add 3 screenshots to `assets/screenshots/`:
  - [ ] `home.png`
  - [ ] `timer-running.png`
  - [ ] `session-complete.png`
- [ ] Verify app runs in Expo Go on phone
- [ ] Record a short demo GIF/video for README
- [ ] Confirm README sections are fully accurate
- [ ] Tag first release (`v1.0.0`) after final QA
